name: Italian Style Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 1 pound lean bacon, finely diced
3 stalks celery, including tops, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook bacon in olive oil until about halfway done.
2. Add celery and onion and cook until transparent.
3. Pour off the fat from the skillet and use it to cook the giblets, then prosciutto, and liver until done. (Freeze the liver to make it easier to chop.)
4. Mix with bacon and vegetables and let cool.
5. Soak bread in stock and combine with meat and vegetable mixture.
6. Add cheese, parsley, eggs, and seasonings and mix with hands.
7. Stuff a 12-15 pound turkey.
